maxItems.title: Max items per target
maxItems.description: Maximum videos to extract per hashtag/profile.

cookies.title: TikTok cookies (optional)
cookies.description: Cookie string from a logged-in TikTok session (e.g. 'sessionid=...; msToken=...'). Greatly improves success vs. anonymous, but TikTok still detects automation over time. Ban risk on the account.

useProxy.title: Use Apify residential proxy
useProxy.description: Strongly recommended — TikTok blocks datacenter IPs. Uses residential credit.
